title: TC-22 blaster rifle

The '''TC-22 blaster rifle''' was used by new recruits in the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness's]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Army/Legends|army]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. Later, by [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], an updated version of the [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] was used by both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]].

==Description==
The TC-22 [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] was held with both hands, and the trigger discharged a single [[Laser/Legends|bolt]] when depressed. The sights of the TC-22 were skewed slightly to one side—a common problem among TC-model [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. Over [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Scope/Legends|scope]] often lost its precise calibration, although that problem was easily fixed with some adjustments. The rifle had decent blasting power and a range of up to sixty-four [[Meter/Legends|meters]],<ref name="SWG" /> although each [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]] only held enough energy for fifty shots before it had to be replaced.<ref name="PoD" /> The rifle model used in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was [[black]] and had a [[blue]] [[firing chamber]], and the scope was close to the wire stock.<ref name="SWG" />

==History==
TC-22 rifles were first manufactured sometime prior to the [[Battle of Phaseera]], which took place in [[1002 BBY]]. The TC-22 was the first rifle that was assigned to most [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] in the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness's]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Army/Legends|army]], and it was reserved for new recruits and soldiers with lower ranks. [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Darth Bane/Legends|Dessel]], a former [[Cortosis/Legends|cortosis]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Apatros/Legends|Apatros]], preferred to use a TC-22 when he fought as a member of the [[Gloom Walkers]], a [[unit]] in the Brotherhood of Darkness.<ref name="PoD" />

An updated replica of the TC-22 blaster rifle was still in use by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], over a thousand years later. The soldiers of both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used the updated version of the rifle by [[1 ABY/Legends|1.5 ABY]]. The TC-22 could be bought from either an [[Imperial recruiter]] or [[Recruitment Agent|Rebel recruiter]] as a reward for valiant performance on the battlefield. At least some of these TC-22s had the words "[[Rule by the Strong]]" engraved on the barrel, echoing the beliefs of the long-defunct Brotherhood which once fielded them.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The TC-22 blaster rifle first featured in the novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'', released on [[September 26]], [[2006]] and written by [[Drew Karpyshyn]]. It later appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' after it was added to the game in Game Update 15, released on [[January 26]], [[2010]].

Game Update 15 introduced the Galactic Civil War update, which added player-versus-player and player-versus-environment invasions to the online game. The invasions take place once every two [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] in the [[City/Legends|cities]] of [[Dearic/Legends|Dearic]], [[Keren/Legends|Keren]], and [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]]. Reward tokens could be earned for completing certain tasks during the invasion's duration, and the tokens themselves could be taken to a recruiter—either Rebel or Imperial—and exchanged for various items, including the TC-22. As a purchasable weapon, the TC-22 is worth 1,000 tokens and can be turned into a schematic by the player, then taken to a [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] and recreated into a more powerful version of the weapon.
